error.signature: tensorflow.python.framework.errors_impl.UnknownError: Failed to get convolution algorithm. This is probably because cuDNN failed to initialize
error.regex: (Failed to get convolution algorithm|cuDNN failed to initialize|CUDNN_STATUS_INTERNAL_ERROR|Could not create cudnn handle|CUDNN_STATUS_NOT_INITIALIZED)

verdict.summary: cuDNN cannot select a convolution algorithm. Usually a cuDNN/CUDA version mismatch or GPU memory already exhausted.

dead_ends.action: Downgrade cuDNN to an older version blindly
dead_ends.why_fails: cuDNN must match CUDA and TF versions exactly. Arbitrary downgrades cause ABI incompatibilities.

dead_ends.action: Set TF_CUDNN_USE_AUTOTUNE=0 to skip algorithm selection
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling autotuning avoids the error but makes convolutions extremely slow (10-50x slower).

workarounds.action: Enable GPU memory growth to prevent cuDNN OOM during init
Install matching cuDNN version for your CUDA/TF combination
workarounds.how: TF 2.15 requires CUDA 12.2 + cuDNN 8.9. Check tensorflow.org/install/source#gpu

workarounds.action: Use pip install tensorflow[and-cuda] for bundled compatible libraries
workarounds.how: pip install tensorflow[and-cuda]  # auto-installs matching CUDA/cuDNN
